title: Character Design Sheet I2i AI
sourceTitle: Character Design Sheet I2i AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image official-style character design sheet for young adult neon courier with short teal hair, amber utility jacket, focused expression, and compact drone companion, using a local character-and-background reference image. Subject: young adult neon courier with short teal hair, amber utility jacket, focused expression, and compact drone companion remains consistent across the sheet, with hooded amber tech jacket, black cargo trousers, fingerless gloves, messenger satchel, compact scanner, folded delivery map, and drone module parts translated into clear front, side, back, expression, and equipment-detail views. Scene: rainy neon megacity alley with noodle-stall signs, wet pavement reflections, elevated rail silhouettes, and blue-magenta city glow informs the world style, palette cues, costume logic, props, and small background motif panels while the sheet itself stays on a clean white presentation board. Composition: Fixed professional concept-art sheet layout on a clean white background: three-view turnaround across the upper area, expression variation strip, exploded costume and equipment diagram, color palette swatches, small reference-background vignette, and a concise world-building note. Signature Elements: Three-view turnaround, expression variations, exploded costume and equipment details, palette swatches, reference-background vignette, and short world-building note are all required sheet modules. Source anchor: ai image prompt archive anchor 628091. Style: Official animation or game character design sheet style with polished illustration finish, consistent proportions, clean linework, readable modules, professional concept-art quality, and high-resolution presentation clarity. Color Palette: Palette swatches are extracted from the reference character and environment, with restrained accent colors, readable labels, and enough white space for design-board clarity. Lighting: Neutral studio sheet lighting for character views, with small environmental lighting cues only inside the reference-background vignette. Camera: Orthographic front, side, and back character views mixed with controlled close-up expression crops and clean equipment callout angles. Typography: Use NEON COURIER as the readable title; include a short note: a last-mile courier navigating flooded megacity districts with a pocket drone; keep all other labels concise, structured, and design-sheet appropriate. Restrictions: Keep one coherent original character, preserve the reference costume and world cues, maintain readable sheet modules, consistent anatomy, clear labels, and professional concept-art organization.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image official-style character design sheet for adult desert relic hunter with copper skin, ash-blond cropped hair, calm sharp eyes, and a mechanical falcon companion, using a local character-and-background reference image. Subject: adult desert relic hunter with copper skin, ash-blond cropped hair, calm sharp eyes, and a mechanical falcon companion remains consistent across the sheet, with sand cloak, reinforced leather harness, brass compass gauntlet, utility belts, scarf, travel boots, relic scanner, and mechanical falcon modules translated into clear front, side, back, expression, and equipment-detail views. Scene: sun-bleached desert ruins with carved stone gates, windblown banners, warm dust haze, and distant canyon silhouettes informs the world style, palette cues, costume logic, props, and small background motif panels while the sheet itself stays on a clean white presentation board. Composition: Fixed professional concept-art sheet layout on a clean white background: three-view turnaround across the upper area, expression variation strip, exploded costume and equipment diagram, color palette swatches, small reference-background vignette, and a concise world-building note. Signature Elements: Three-view turnaround, expression variations, exploded costume and equipment details, palette swatches, reference-background vignette, and short world-building note are all required sheet modules. Source anchor: ai image prompt archive anchor 628091. Style: Official animation or game character design sheet style with polished illustration finish, consistent proportions, clean linework, readable modules, professional concept-art quality, and high-resolution presentation clarity. Color Palette: Palette swatches are extracted from the reference character and environment, with restrained accent colors, readable labels, and enough white space for design-board clarity. Lighting: Neutral studio sheet lighting for character views, with small environmental lighting cues only inside the reference-background vignette. Camera: Orthographic front, side, and back character views mixed with controlled close-up expression crops and clean equipment callout angles. Typography: Use RELIC FALCONER as the readable title; include a short note: a quiet artifact scout mapping forbidden ruins with a loyal clockwork falcon; keep all other labels concise, structured, and design-sheet appropriate. Restrictions: Keep one coherent original character, preserve the reference costume and world cues, maintain readable sheet modules, consistent anatomy, clear labels, and professional concept-art organization.
